reviews.originalComment: Harga Worth it, cuma kebersihan sekitar (lorong², ruang resepsionis dan halaman kurang bersih). Kamar oke dan nyaman, Cuma tidak ada fasilitas sabun dan air, serta handuk.
reviews.reviewComments: The price is worth it, but the cleanliness in the around (hallways, reception area, and courtyard) is lacking. The room is okay and comfortable, but there are no soap and water facilities, as well as towels.

Fasilitas kurang memuaskan
Bed terlalu kecil untuk 2 orang
Kalau ada kendala pelayanan nya agak kudang memuaskan

reviews.reviewTitle: The hotel refused to check in from Agoda.
reviews.originalTitle: Hotel menolak cek in dari agoda
reviews.originalComment: Pihak hotel beralasan Tidak bekerja sama dengan agoda.  Pada pesanan sudah sukses. Tidak usah book hotel ini
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel party claims to not cooperate with Agoda. The order has already been successfully completed. Don't book this hotel.

reviews.originalComment: Kami tamu jauh dr surabaya. Sampai ke aceh malam dengan membawa 3 balita. Ketika kami check in tidak dibukakan pintu, 1 jam kami tunggu tak kunjung dibuka. Akhirnya kami menginap di masjid terdekat. Besoknya kami kembali untuk meminta refund dana karena kami tidak menggunakan fasilitas. Tp pihak hotel menolak. Kami sangat kecewa.  Sunguh tidak bertanggung jawab.  Semoga tidak terjadi pada wisatawan lain
reviews.reviewComments: We are guests from Surabaya. We arrived in Aceh at night with 3 toddlers. When we checked in, the door was not opened for us, and we waited for 1 hour without any response. Eventually, we stayed at the nearest mosque. The next day we returned to request a refund because we didn't use the facilities. But the hotel management refused. We are very disappointed. This is truly irresponsible. Hopefully, this does not happen to other tourists.
Dengan harga murah menurutku penginapan ini sudah sangat cocok

Dekat di tengah kota banda aceh

實際住宿房間設施，與網站介紹不相同
員工完全不懂英文，也與網站所示不同
